name: Sky-Glider Bot
oracle_text: Alt-Mode (Interceptor) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 1/1 and it gains flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Small, sleek, and deceptively fast once the thrusters kick in.
design_notes: This card is designed for the WU Skyline Patrol archetype. As a common, it introduces the Alt-Mode mechanic by providing an affordable way to turn a ground-based creature into a flyer. This supports the strategy of using evasive threats to chip away at life totals. The mana cost and ability cost are balanced so that a flying threat costs 2 mana total (cast + activate), making it a tempo-oriented piece for Blue players.
